title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions:
Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions!
